Retreating is when the [[Thing beyond itself]] retreats past the [[horizon]] out of your experience.<ref name=":0">[[Reacting to the Meaning Crisis]] episode 47 47:00</ref> 

It is the opposite of [[shining]].<ref name=":0" />

== See Also ==

* [[void]]
* [[Phenomenal knowing]]

== References ==
[[Category:Phenomenology]]
[[Category:John Vervaeke]]
[[sn:Retreating]]
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
